name: Cat Fest Chicken Meat Sticks For Cats 45g
description: Description The most delicate chicken is carefully ground to become your cat’s favorite treat. Ingredients: chicken meat, plant products, minerals. Analytical components: crude protein 31%, fats 4.5%, crude fiber 0.1% moisture 25%; energy value – 164.5 kcal. Usage: Serve as a treat during the day. Adjust the amount according to your pet’s needs and condition. Do not overdo it.
